flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at New Mexico Highlands University fell 78% between 2021 and 2024 (17.8% → 3.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New Mexico Highlands University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at New Mexico Highlands University are 18% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($45.9k vs $39.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at New Mexico Highlands University fell 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.8k → $11.4k).
